top_signals.title: NextEra CEO Positive About Dominion Offshore Wind Project
top_signals.summary: The chief executive of NextEra Energy said on Monday that his company felt good about Dominion's investment in offshore wind, a technology he has disparaged in the past.CEO John Ketchum made the remarks on a call with investors to discuss NextEra's $66.8 billion bid for Dominion…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
